cases.failure_type: Consumer-harm and servicing-control breakdown across major retail product lines.
cases.missing_evidence_artifact: Cross-workflow, replayable decision trace linking inputs, controls, and remediation actions.

cases.failure_type: Control, supervision, and record-integrity gaps in regulated operational workflows.
cases.missing_evidence_artifact: Tamper-evident control evidence connecting policy decisions and operational outcomes.

cases.failure_type: Governance and disclosure mismatch between AI claims and control evidence.
cases.missing_evidence_artifact: Deterministic replay and trace-backed governance documentation for AI decision processes.

cases.case_title: AI operational-loss research in U.S. BHCs
cases.failure_type: Operational-risk exposure growth outpacing controls and governance maturity.
cases.missing_evidence_artifact: Pre-escalation decision evidence that can be replayed, challenged, and audited.

cases.failure_type: Risk-governance gaps in model, cybersecurity, and compliance control execution.
cases.missing_evidence_artifact: Integrated decision-level audit trail across model outputs, policy thresholds, and review steps.

loss_exposure_mapping.limitation: C-DAG does not prove prevention or savings. It packages replayable evidence and audit-ready artifacts for review.

holdout_baseline.limitation: Baseline outcome validation, not production model performance.
